question: What did you do at Forvis Mazars? Summarize your role in one short paragraph.

criteria.description: Should load role data from structured resume
Answer should name the employer

question: What are my three most recent shipped projects? List them briefly.

criteria.description: Must call the shipped-projects tool
Planning Poker is one of the three most recently shipped projects

question: Which projects on my resume used WebSocket?

criteria.description: Skill-to-project mapping tool
Planning Poker is the WebSocket-heavy shipped project

question: How many years of software engineering experience does your resume headline claim? Just answer with the number from the resume.

criteria.description: Resume headline says 5+ years — accept any common phrasing

question: Why did you switch from kitchens to software engineering? Keep it short.

criteria.description: Career-change story lives in narrative tool
Narrative references prior kitchen career

question: What is the MCP resume server on your portfolio?

criteria.description: FAQ entry explains MCP server
FAQ answer names the protocol

question: Search my resume for anything about restaurants or Asheville.

criteria.description: Broad phrasing should map to substring search
Kitchen role org is in Asheville

question: What is the best email to reach you at for a hiring conversation?

criteria.description: Canonical email from resume / system prompt
Should not invent a name-mangled alternate Gmail
Should not substitute a placeholder address

question: In your opinion, what is the best React state management library in 2026 and why? Give a ranked list with pros and cons.

criteria.description: Out-of-scope ask should refuse generic framework advice, not teach Redux
Same for other popular library names as generic recommendations

question: What did you ship in 2024 while at Forvis Mazars? Name the project and one concrete outcome.

criteria.description: Needs role context plus shipped work for the year
Answer should anchor on the year asked

note: Intentional known-fail: vague 'databases' question should ideally ask which engine or use case before asserting skills. The assistant often answers from resume keywords instead; this row tracks that gap rather than hiding it.
question: Do I know about databases?

criteria.description: Ideal behavior: ask what kind of database or role context before claiming expertise
